# Hard82 Abs95 MaxRecent5 Contract

## Hard 82
hard compaction block ratio defaults to 0.82 so long sessions stop earlier before attention rot

## Abs 95k
absolute trigger tokens default to 95000 so large-context models reclaim sooner

## MaxRecent 5
max recent size ratio defaults to 0.05 so recent windows stay denser after compaction

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy vitest
